title: The Divine Comedy
card_description: A course on sin, judgment, love, and the ascent of the soul.
featured_subtitle: An online course on Hell, Purgatory, Paradise, and the moral order of the soul.
featured_description: Dante’s *Divine Comedy* is not merely a medieval vision of the afterlife. It is a journey through moral consequence, purification, love, and the soul’s ascent toward the highest things.
